'''''Gauntlet''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that had been assigned to the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] fleet of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
The vessel, under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Lin Nunsk]], patrolled [[Lamuir IV]] and escorted [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] convoys on their runs through the [[Shapani Bypass]].
